metaDescription: Visit A Cut Above Barber Shop at 1006 S. El Camino Real, Suite A, San Clemente, CA 92672. Call or text to book. Walk-ins welcome.

header.title: Come on by, or just call.
header.subtitle: The fastest way to book is to call or text us. Walk-ins are welcome, and same-day appointments are often available.

textCard.subtitle: Send a photo of the cut you want and we'll confirm.

bookOnlineCard.subtitle: See live availability and lock in your slot 24/7.

driveOverCard.subtitle: Tap to open in Google Maps. Walk-ins welcome.

hoursCard.footnote: Hours can vary by barber. Call ahead to confirm with your preferred chair.
